plugins.name: browser-harness
plugins.description: Direct browser control via CDP using browser-harness CLI. Connects to the user's already-running Chrome for automation, scraping, testing, and web interaction.

plugins.name: cmux-guide
plugins.description: cmux terminal multiplexer guide — skills and agents for learning, configuring, and automating cmux.

plugins.name: cmux-resurrect
plugins.description: Save and restore cmux workspaces and CLI agent sessions after Mac reboot.

plugins.name: d200x-dev
plugins.description: Ulanzi D200X Stream Controller plugin development agents. SDK reference, plugin scaffolding, and deploy/debug support.

plugins.name: qmd-knowledge
plugins.description: Local hybrid search over knowledge base using QMD with balanced lex+vec strategy and LLM reranking.

plugins.name: env-registry
plugins.description: Environment database capturing tools, services, commands, URLs, MCP servers, plugins, and skills across all devices.

plugins.name: super-fork
plugins.description: Fork Claude Code sessions with more power than the built-in desktop fork. Works with remote-control sessions and supports specific session UUIDs.
